case_title: MIZUHO SATO VS. ARTHUR R. ABELSON

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT ABELSON, ARTHUR R.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-02-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
NOTICE OF CHALLENGE OF VENUE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY SATO, MIZUHO AS TO DEFENDANT ABELSON, ARTHUR R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-15-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-02-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MIZUHO SATO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARTHUR R. ABELSON IS PRESENT. VENUE CHALLENGE IS HEARD AND THE COURT FINDS VENUE IS NOT PROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
